hero_title: The bridge between your coach and your results.
hero_subtitle: 6way brings everything together: custom programs, session tracking, weekly check-ins. For coaches who want to coach better, and athletes who want to train smarter.
feat_1_desc: Your coach builds the plan, you execute it. Exercises, weights, rest times — everything ready, session after session.
feat_2_desc: Every session logged, every kilo documented. You see where you started, your coach sees where you're going.
feat_3_desc: Suggestions based on your training data. Your coach always has the final say.
feat_4_desc: Weight suggestions, built-in timer, rest countdown. Everything you need during your session, nothing you don't.
form_subtitle: We're building 6way with our first users. Spots are limited — come join us.
form_objective_placeholder: e.g. muscle gain, getting back in shape, competition prep...
form_success: Request received — we'll be in touch soon.
form_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
legal_mentions_content: 6way is a product of From6 Agency.
